mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_response( id, form_id, respondent_id, quality_flag, elapsed_seconds, anon_label, consent_at) VALUES ( #{responseId}, #{formId}, #{respondentId}, #{qualityFlag}, #{elapsedSeconds}, #{anonLabel}, #{consentAt})
INSERT INTO survey_answer(response_id, question_id, value) VALUES (#{responseId}, #{questionId}, #{value})
INSERT INTO response_session(form_id, respondent_id, started_at) VALUES (#{formId}, #{respondentId}, now()) ON CONFLICT (form_id, respondent_id) DO UPDATE SET started_at = now()
